title: Simple Mod Sync
description: A simple way to share and sync mods, resource packs, shaders, and other Minecraft content with your friends or community.
body:
[![Fabric Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Works%20On-Fabric-lightyellow?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://fabricmc.net) [![Runs on Quilt](https://img.shields.io/badge/Works%20On-Quilt-purple?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://quiltmc.org/en/) [![Runs on NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Works%20On-NeoForge-informational?logo=data:image/png;base64,&style=flat&logoColor=333333&color=ffbe6f&labelColor=3d3846)](https://neoforged.net/)


Simple Mod Sync lets you create a list of mods and other content that can be automatically downloaded and updated. Instead of telling your friends "download these 20 mods from different websites," you give them one link and this mod does the rest!

Think of it like a shopping list, but for Minecraft content. You write down what you want (the URLs to download files), and Simple Mod Sync goes shopping for you.

## Video

This video covers all the basics, from players or server owners perspective

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8SliNfmfpOs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Features

- **Automated Content Synchronization**: Synchronize mods from a specified URL on every game start.
- **User-Friendly Setup**: Simple configuration with minimal setup required.

For more information check the [Github page](https://github.com/oxydien/simple-mod-sync?tab=readme-ov-file#simple-mod-sync)
